Apply for a seat → What is BoltzRoom?
Admission is free  ·  Seats are limited and curated  ·  Apply below

Not a conference.
Not a seminar.
Just the room.

BoltzRoom is a curated hangout for business owners, founders, and leaders in Lagos. The idea is simple: what if smart people sat in a room together, dropped the performance, and actually talked about business?

No massive stages. No empty slides. No motivational fluff. Just real conversations, practical frameworks, and the kind of clarity that usually costs a consulting fee.

We've done it twice. Both times, people left talking about it for weeks.

☕
Casual vibe
Come as you are. Good drinks, good energy, good music. The dress code is whatever you wore to your meeting that day.
💡
Sharp thinking
Every edition has a real agenda shaped by the people in the room. Your questions, your problems — live diagnosis.
📊
Real frameworks
Boltzmenn brings proprietary tools into the room. You leave with things you can use — not just things to think about.
🤝
Your people
Founders, operators, and leaders who actually run things. No tourists. No spectators. Everyone in the room belongs there.
It's been done before

Two editions. One vibe. Zero regrets.

BoltzRoom started in May 2025 and returned in July 2025. Both editions sold out and left founders asking when the next one would be.

What we'll get into

The agenda is partly shaped by what you tell us when you apply. Here's what we always cover:

01
Why you're still the bottleneck in your own business
And how to build systems that run without you in every conversation.
02
Revenue that doesn't need you to personally close it
Sales systems, customer experience, and what's killing your conversions.
03
What your numbers are actually telling you
Financial clarity without the jargon. Know where to look and what it means.
04
Open floor — your business, live
Rosario opens the floor for real diagnosis. Bring your real questions.
Business systems Revenue growth Founder mindset Customer experience Real conversations Financial clarity Scaling without chaos Good vibes Live diagnosis People who get it Free drinks Practical frameworks
Your host
Rosario Anthony
Co-founder, Boltzmenn  ·  Growth Strategist

Rosario has spent years in the middle of African founder chaos — diagnosing broken businesses, building the systems that should have existed, and translating complexity into clarity that founders can actually use. BoltzRoom is where he takes that work into a room and does it with people, not just for them.

No filtered version. No speaker persona. Just the thinking, out loud, in a room that earns it.
